content.text: Configure effects and transitions to add subtle motion and visual feedback to your website. All effects respect the user's prefers-reduced-motion setting.
Elements animate into view as you scroll down. Uses CSS animation-timeline: view() for scroll-driven animations.
Turn on one or more effects in the Options tab to configure them.

content.title: Range Start
content.tooltip: When the entrance animation begins.

content.title: Range End
content.tooltip: When the entrance animation completes.

content.title: Stagger Interval
content.tooltip: Delay between each child element's animation when using the on-enter--stagger class. Uses CSS sibling-index() — limited browser support.

content.title: Starting Opacity
content.tooltip: The initial opacity before fading in (0 = fully transparent).

content.title: Starting Scale
content.tooltip: The initial scale before growing (0.9 = starts at 90%).

content.title: Starting Scale
content.tooltip: The initial scale before shrinking (1.1 = starts at 110%).

content.title: Blur Amount
content.tooltip: How blurred the element starts before sharpening.

content.text: Mimics fixed background parallax. Parent container should have overflow: hidden.

content.title: Parallax Distance
content.tooltip: Total travel distance of the parallax effect. Element moves half this distance above and below its natural position.

content.title: Distance
content.tooltip: How far the element floats upward during the animation.

content.title: Distance
content.tooltip: How far the element sinks downward during the animation.

content.title: Distance
content.tooltip: How far the element slides in from the side.

content.text: Elements animate out as you scroll past them. Perfect for hero sections and above-the-fold content.
Turn on one or more effects in the Options tab to configure them.

content.title: Exit Range Start
content.tooltip: When the exit animation begins. Use 'cover 50%' to start while element is still visible, or 'exit 0%' to start when element begins leaving viewport.

content.title: Exit Range End
content.tooltip: When the exit animation completes.

content.title: Stagger Interval
content.tooltip: Delay between each child element's animation when using the on-exit--stagger class. Uses CSS sibling-index() — limited browser support.

content.title: Exit Opacity
content.tooltip: The final opacity when exiting (0 = fully transparent).

content.title: Distance
content.tooltip: How far the element floats upward during the exit animation.

content.title: Distance
content.tooltip: How far the element sinks downward during the exit animation.

content.title: Grow Scale
content.tooltip: The final scale when exiting (1.1 = grow to 110%).

content.title: Shrink Scale
content.tooltip: The final scale when exiting (0.9 = shrink to 90%).

content.title: Distance
content.tooltip: How far the element slides out to the side.

content.title: Blur Amount
content.tooltip: How blurred the element becomes when exiting.

content.text: Elements animate once when they become visible. Unlike scroll animations, On Visible plays once and doesn't reverse. Uses Intersection Observer for reliable triggering.
Turn on one or more effects in the Options tab to configure them.

content.title: Duration
content.tooltip: How long On Visible animations take to complete.

content.title: Timing Function
content.tooltip: Easing function for On Visible animations.

content.title: Default Delay
content.tooltip: Default delay before On Visible animations begin.

content.title: Visibility Threshold
content.tooltip: How much of the element must be visible to trigger (0-1). 0.2 = 20% visible.

content.title: Stagger Interval
content.tooltip: Delay between each child element's animation when using the on-visible--stagger class. Uses CSS sibling-index() — limited browser support.

content.title: Starting Opacity
content.tooltip: The initial opacity before fading in (0 = fully transparent).

content.title: Starting Scale
content.tooltip: The initial scale before growing (0.9 = starts at 90%).

content.title: Starting Scale
content.tooltip: The initial scale before shrinking (1.1 = starts at 110%).

content.title: Blur Amount
content.tooltip: How blurred the element starts before sharpening.

content.title: Distance
content.tooltip: How far the element floats upward during the animation.

content.title: Distance
content.tooltip: How far the element sinks downward during the animation.

content.title: Distance
content.tooltip: How far the element slides in from the side.

content.text: Animated border and underline effects that appear on hover. Great for buttons, links, and interactive elements.
Turn on one or more effects in the Options tab to configure them.

content.title: Color
content.tooltip: Color of the ripple border.

content.title: Width
content.tooltip: Thickness of the ripple border.

content.title: Duration
content.tooltip: Animation duration for the ripple effect.

content.title: Distance
content.tooltip: How far the ripple expands outward.

content.title: Color
content.tooltip: Color of the outline border.

content.title: Width
content.tooltip: Thickness of the outline border.

content.title: Duration
content.tooltip: Transition duration for the outline effect.

content.title: Color
content.tooltip: Color of the underline.

content.title: Width
content.tooltip: Thickness of the underline.

content.title: Duration
content.tooltip: Transition duration for the underline effect.

content.text: Box-shadow and glow effects that appear on hover. Add depth and visual feedback to interactive elements.
Turn on one or more effects in the Options tab to configure them.

content.title: Shadow
content.tooltip: The box-shadow applied on hover.

content.title: Glow Color
content.tooltip: The color of the glow effect.

content.title: Glow Spread
content.tooltip: How far the glow spreads from the element.

content.title: Glow Opacity
content.tooltip: The opacity of the glow (0-1).

content.text: Scale and translate effects that trigger on hover. Uses modern individual transform properties for better composability.
Turn on one or more effects in the Options tab to configure them.

content.title: Grow Amount
content.tooltip: The scale factor on hover (1 = no change, 1.05 = 5% larger).

content.title: Shrink Amount
content.tooltip: The scale factor on hover (1 = no change, 0.95 = 5% smaller).

content.title: Float Distance
content.tooltip: How far the element floats up on hover (negative = up).

content.title: Sink Distance
content.tooltip: How far the element sinks down on hover (positive = down).

content.title: Slide Right Distance
content.tooltip: How far the element slides right on hover.

content.title: Slide Left Distance
content.tooltip: How far the element slides left on hover.

content.text: Transitions are micro animations that can enhance the user experience by providing visual feedback when elements change state. Define your default transition styles here.

content.title: Transition Variables
content.tooltip: Variables for transitions.

content.title: Timing Function
content.tooltip: The default timing function for transitions.

content.title: Duration
content.tooltip: The default duration/length of transitions.

content.title: Delay
content.tooltip: The default delay before transitions begin.

content.title: Easing Preset Variables
content.tooltip: Enable named easing curve CSS variables (--ease-[name]).

content.text: Easing curves control the acceleration of animations. Use these tokens in your transition-timing-function or animation-timing-function properties.

content.title: Name
content.tooltip: Name your easing preset. This determines the CSS variable name: --ease-[name].

content.title: Value
content.tooltip: Standard easing. Best for general UI transitions like hover effects, menus, and modals.

content.title: Name
content.tooltip: Name your easing preset. This determines the CSS variable name: --ease-[name].

content.title: Value
content.tooltip: Fast start, gentle stop. Ideal for scroll animations, dropdowns opening, and content revealing.

content.title: Name
content.tooltip: Name your easing preset. This determines the CSS variable name: --ease-[name].

content.title: Value
content.tooltip: Symmetrical acceleration and deceleration. Best for elements moving from point A to B, like sliders, carousels, and position changes.

content.title: Name
content.tooltip: Name your easing preset. This determines the CSS variable name: --ease-[name].

content.title: Value
content.tooltip: Bouncy overshoot effect. Use sparingly for playful interactions like notification badges, fun buttons, or attention-grabbing micro-interactions.

content.title: Name
content.tooltip: Name your easing preset. This determines the CSS variable name: --ease-[name].

content.title: Value
content.tooltip: Elastic spring effect with slight overshoot and settle. Great for attention-grabbing entrances and playful interactions.

content.text: Enable or disable effects and configure global settings.

content.title: Fade
content.tooltip: Simple fade with no movement.

content.title: Float
content.tooltip: Floats up into view.

content.title: Sink
content.tooltip: Sinks down into view.

content.title: Slide Left / Right
content.tooltip: Slides in from the side.

content.title: Grow
content.tooltip: Grows from a smaller size.

content.title: Shrink
content.tooltip: Shrinks from a larger size.

content.title: Blur
content.tooltip: Starts blurred and sharpens.

content.title: Parallax
content.tooltip: Creates a fixed-background-like parallax depth effect. Element moves slower than scroll.

content.title: Animation Duration
content.tooltip: How long entrance animations take to complete.

content.title: Animation Timing
content.tooltip: Easing function for entrance animations. Use an easing token like var(--ease-smooth) or a custom cubic-bezier.

content.title: Default Delay
content.tooltip: Default delay before entrance animations begin.

content.title: Fade
content.tooltip: Fades as you scroll past.

content.title: Float
content.tooltip: Floats upward as you scroll past.

content.title: Sink
content.tooltip: Sinks downward as you scroll past.

content.title: Grow
content.tooltip: Grows larger as you scroll past.

content.title: Shrink
content.tooltip: Shrinks as you scroll past.

content.title: Slide Left / Right
content.tooltip: Slides out to the side as you scroll past.

content.title: Blur
content.tooltip: Blurs the element as you scroll past.

content.title: Fade
content.tooltip: Fades in when visible.

content.title: Float
content.tooltip: Floats up into view when visible.

content.title: Sink
content.tooltip: Sinks down into view when visible.

content.title: Slide Left / Right
content.tooltip: Slides in from the side when visible.

content.title: Grow
content.tooltip: Grows from a smaller size when visible.

content.title: Shrink
content.tooltip: Shrinks from a larger size when visible.

content.title: Blur
content.tooltip: Starts blurred and sharpens when visible.

content.title: Hover Transition Duration
content.tooltip: Duration for hover effect transitions. Uses global transition duration by default.

content.title: Hover Timing Function
content.tooltip: Easing function for hover effect transitions. Uses global transition timing by default.

content.title: Ripple In / Out
content.tooltip: Border ripples inward or outward on hover.

content.title: Outline In / Out
content.tooltip: Outline moves inward or outward on hover.

content.title: Underline (Left / Center / Right)
content.tooltip: Animated underline from different directions.

content.title: Brighten
content.tooltip: Increases brightness on hover. Great for images.

content.title: Fade
content.tooltip: Reduces opacity on hover.

content.title: Shadow
content.tooltip: Adds a box-shadow on hover.

content.title: Glow
content.tooltip: Adds a colored glow around the element on hover.

content.title: Grow
content.tooltip: Scales the element up on hover.

content.title: Shrink
content.tooltip: Scales the element down on hover.

content.title: Float
content.tooltip: Floats the element upward on hover.

content.title: Sink
content.tooltip: Sinks the element downward on hover.

content.title: Slide Right
content.tooltip: Translates element to the right on hover.

content.title: Slide Left
content.tooltip: Translates element to the left on hover.
